name: Resident-edition print
tagline: Limited-run print. Signed, numbered, sized for a wall you actually own.
description: Giclee print on cotton rag, A2 format. Each edition is the wall piece from a resident's most recent quarterly rotation, released in a run of fifty. Signed and numbered by the artist on the lower right. Past editions live in the archive.
imageCaption: Resident-edition A2 print, signed lower right
